---
title: "Recreational activities"
format: html
---

# Recreational Activities

In addition to abstaining from alcohol use, it is important to bring enjoyable and meaningful activities into your life.

For many people in recovery, alcohol use was a primary way to relax or have fun. Now that you are abstinent, it is essential to find healthy alternatives that provide enjoyment, relaxation, and connection.

![](https://github.com/jjcurtin/aud_support/blob/main/modules/images/frisbee.png?raw=true){fig-align="center"}

## Reconnecting with Past Interests

You may want to revisit activities you enjoyed before substance use became a central part of life.

### What are some hobbies or activities you used to enjoy?

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Exploring New Activities

Trying new activities is a powerful way to support recovery and meet new people.

Consider:

-   Taking a class
-   Learning a new skill
-   Creating art or music
-   Joining a sport or fitness activity
-   Doing volunteer work
-   Exploring community events

You can also:

-   Ask friends about hobbies they enjoy
-   Look for classes at local colleges or community centers
-   Check local websites, directories, or newspapers for events

### What new activities or interests would you like to try?

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   

    ------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: callout
## Building Consistency

Not all activities will feel enjoyable right away.

-   It may take time to develop skill or confidence
-   New activities may feel unfamiliar or uncomfortable at first
-   Even old hobbies may feel different during recovery

**The key is consistency.**\
Make activities a regular part of your life, even if enjoyment comes gradually.
:::
